---

## Checklist

* [ ] Code follows project standards.
* [ ] Documentation has been updated.
* [ ] Tests pass successfully.
* [ ] No unnecessary files are included.
* [ ] Configuration changes are documented.
* [ ] Existing functionality has been verified.
